capability.name: Units
capability.description: This capability enables proper scaling and composition of assets with different unit systems, accurate physics simulation through consistent mass and scale units, correct time-sampled animation playback via standardized time units, and reliable color reproduction through defined colorspace units. These requirements ensure that assets have consistent and well-defined units for proper scaling when composed together as well as interpretation in simulation and rendering environments.

requirements.name: meters-per-unit
requirements.message: Stage must specify metersPerUnit to define the linear unit scale

requirements.name: corrective-transforms
requirements.message: Must apply corrective transforms for different units

requirements.name: meters-per-unit-1
requirements.message: Stage must specify metersPerUnit = 1.0 to define the linear unit scale

requirements.name: upaxis
requirements.message: Stage must specify upAxis to define the orientation of the stage

requirements.name: kilograms-per-unit
requirements.message: Stage must specify kilogramsPerUnit to define the mass unit scale, if physics objects are present in the stage.

requirements.name: timecodes-per-second
requirements.message: Stage must specify timeCodesPerSecond, if timesamples are present in the stage.

requirements.name: upaxis-z
requirements.message: Stage must specify upAxis = "Z" to define the orientation of the stage
